steps.title: Compare the equations
steps.content:
Divide the second equation by $3$.
$$\frac{12x+21y=33}{3}$$
This gives
$$4x+7y=11$$
So both equations represent the same line.

steps.title: Write the point
steps.content:
The point that works for every real number $r$ is
$$(r,-\frac{4r}{7}+\frac{11}{7})$$
The answer is A.
